response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and any demonstrable domain expertise in fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking; their career is dominated by web, mobile, and open-source projects using TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief, unrelated C++ stint in LabWindows™/CVI that does not meet the 5–10 year requirement.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Proven ability to build and contribute to open-source systems
Excellent communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No evidence of professional C++ development on Windows platform
Zero mention of SQL Server, Oracle, or fixed income/capital markets domain experience
Primary tech stack (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) is misaligned with core C++/Windows requirement
